issue.observedUi: 追加レイヤーを適用できませんでした: Home AI gateway returned malformed JSON.
issue.rootCause: The Home AI gateway process was not running. Vite returned an empty non-JSON 502 and the browser client misclassified it as malformed model JSON.

fix.proxy: Normalize proxy failures to JSON gateway-unavailable responses.
fix.client: Normalize network refusal and non-JSON 5xx responses while keeping malformed 2xx distinct.
fix.ui: Show an offline and retryable state while preserving editable accompaniment tracks.
fix.launcher: npm.cmd run gateway:ace validates the approved local Python, guarded DiT-only runner, and checkpoints before loopback startup.

remainingGate: Retry the user's current melody and listen to the generated layer before moving the feature from AI-verified star 3 to user-verified star 4.
